scope.summary: Builds and deploys Power Apps code apps with React and Vite and adds Power Platform connectors such as Dataverse, SharePoint, Excel, OneDrive, Teams, Office 365 Outlook, Azure DevOps, and custom connectors.

connectors.name: Dataverse
connectors.riskNotes: Add Dataverse skill generates connector-backed services.

connectors.name: SharePoint Online
connectors.riskNotes: Add SharePoint skill creates connector integration.

connectors.name: Generic connector support
connectors.riskNotes: Add connector and add datasource workflows need DLP and Tech Radar checks per connector.

powerPlatformGovernance.dlpImpact: High. Connector selection is central to the plugin and must be mapped to Equinor DLP rules before pilot use.

exceptions: Current README describes React and Vite but does not document EDS usage.

blockers: Internal owner and support channel are not assigned.
Skills and agent instructions are not reviewed against Equinor guidance.
Production-system interaction is possible by default through create and deploy workflows.
Connector and DLP governance is not mapped.
EDS guidance is not integrated into generated frontend workflows.
Technology Radar status is unknown for Vite and connector-specific technologies.
GitHub Copilot marketplace manifest is missing.

evidence.summary: Documents React and Vite code app generation, deployment, and connector skills.
Contains connector and deployment skills that require DLP review.

notes: Initial review record only. This record intentionally defers publication until detailed review evidence exists.
